description: The marketing website 'acmecorp.test' is experiencing 502 Bad Gateway errors due to traffic spikes. Optimize the PHP-FPM process manager settings for the 'acmecorp.test' virtual server by configuring the pool with the following values: pm = dynamic, pm.max_children = 40, pm.start_servers = 10, pm.min_spare_servers = 5, and pm.max_spare_servers = 15. Ensure the configuration is applied.
